name: oneoff-reminder
description: Fires once at the specified ISO-8601 timestamp, then self-disables
prompt:
It's the time I asked you to remind me about ({date} {time}).

The original intent (edit this prompt before installing!): "<insert reminder here>".

Do whatever follow-up makes sense given the project state — open a cleanup PR, scan the codebase for the flag I wanted removed, file a follow-up issue, or just summarise what's changed since I set this reminder.
